title: ornus europaea
intro: Ornus europaea, also known as the Buckthorn or Column-berry, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly the fruits and bark, which contain anthraquinones, a type of compound with laxative and purgative properties. The health benefits of Ornus europaea include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and support the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Ornus europaea may include teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
